changes_made: Renamed k8s_admission_controller_audit_override_logging to k8s_admission_audit_override_logging for consistency with resource naming conventions
review_notes: The functions generally map well to the control AC-3(10) by focusing on audit logging and admission control mechanisms. However, the naming of the admission controller function needed slight adjustment for consistency with the established naming pattern.
naming_improvements: Ensure resource names like 'admission' are consistently used across similar checks
title: Access Enforcement - Access enforcement | audited override of access control mechanisms employ an aud
step1_reasoning: The control AC-3(10) focuses on auditing overrides of access control mechanisms. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture access control events. Additionally, admission controllers can be used to enforce and log any overrides or exceptions to access control policies.
